projects.title: Health & Wellness Chatbot
projects.description: Health and Wellness Chatbot delivers personalized recommendations for health, mental wellness, nutrition, and fitness through real-time interaction, sentiment analysis, and integration with wearable technologies.
projects.executionPlan: Build and fine-tune sentiment analysis and recommendation models, integrate multimodal (text, voice) interfaces, synchronize with wearable health trackers, and maintain user privacy through secure data management.

projects.title: Amazon Careers Job Description Generator
projects.description: Amazon Job Description Generator automates the creation of tailored, compliance-friendly job postings using advanced AI algorithms, improving recruitment efficiency and candidate relevance.
projects.executionPlan: Develop user-friendly web interface for job criteria inputs, implement AI-powered text generation, offer tiered monetization, and integrate regulatory compliance validation.

projects.title: Product Recommendation Chatbot
projects.description: Product Recommendation Chatbot simplifies consumer tech purchases by delivering personalized product recommendations, explanations, and comparisons across multiple electronic categories.
projects.executionPlan: Collect product data via APIs, deploy cosine similarity algorithms for product matching, integrate GPT-generated recommendation explanations, and monetize through subscriptions and affiliate partnerships.

projects.title: Stock Prediction AI
projects.description: Stock Prediction AI utilizes NLP and advanced sentiment analysis on financial news and market headlines to predict short-term stock movements and help investors make data-driven decisions.
projects.executionPlan: Gather financial data, preprocess news content, fine-tune NLP models (Mistral-7B), deploy visual dashboards for insights, and enforce stringent data privacy measures.
